description_long: This is a composite table made from two distinct halves joined together, each with a different style and material. The left half features ornate, turned wooden legs and a dark wood tabletop, adorned with a pink birthday cake with candles, a steak, and several plates of pastries. The right half is a simpler, utilitarian folding table with metal legs and a light gray surface, holding a slice of chocolate cake and a napkin. The juxtaposition of the elegant wooden section and the practical folding table creates a visually striking contrast. The table is set for a celebration, with food items and desserts arranged on both surfaces. The overall structure is rectangular, with the two halves seamlessly connected at the center.
description: A hybrid table combining an ornate wooden section with a dark finish and a simple folding table with a light gray top, both covered with cakes and pastries.
description_view_0: The ornate wooden legs and dark tabletop are prominent on the left, with a pink cake and pastries, while the right shows the plain folding table with a slice of cake.
description_view_1: From the end of the folding table, the metal legs and light gray surface are most visible, with a slice of cake in the foreground and the ornate section in the background.
description_view_2: The folding table is on the left, showing its metal legs and light surface, while the right side highlights the decorative wooden legs and a full view of the pink cake.
description_view_3: The ornate wooden section is at the front, displaying the pink cake and pastries, with the folding table and its cake slice receding into the background.
